title: 1st Place Champion - ISSIC 2025
desc: Secured 1st Place in University Category and IoT for Health and Safety Sub-Theme at the IoT Smart Solution Innovation Challenge. Evaluated on hardware assembly precision and code troubleshooting speed.

title: Best Technology - PBL Expo Polinema
desc: Awarded 'Best Technology' as part of Tim Bolo Suryo, outperforming numerous project-based learning initiatives based on engineering complexity and real-world impact.

title: 2nd Place - National UI/UX Design (IT-CAS)
desc: Secured 2nd Place at IT-Competition AMIKOM Surakarta by developing a user-centric digital product prototype using comprehensive UI/UX methodologies and Figma.

title: Bronze Medalist - National Essay
desc: Achieved Bronze at Forum Indonesia Muda (FIM) 2 for articulating strategic, innovative concepts and academic arguments addressing contemporary issues.
